positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration of a majestic forest animal, specifically a stylized fox, rendered in a bold, geometric tattoo art style. The fox is depicted mid-leap, surrounded by abstract botanical elements like oversized fern leaves and curling vines. The composition should feature strong negative space and clean, distinct silhouettes against a creamy off-white background. Use a limited color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, burnt orange, and black line work. The overall mood is whimsical yet sophisticated, suitable for a central chest print on apparel. Intricate linework, high contrast, clean edges, vector quality, perfect symmetry, digital art.
negative: blur, artifacts, low quality, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, extra limbs, messy, messy background, gradients, realism, photorealistic, photographic
